caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the legible text "Rode" on the microphone body and "Rode Procaster" on the arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly; he looks toward the side and speaks with his mouth open in the initial moments, then closes his mouth and looks slightly off-camera to the left in the final frames. His left arm, which is tattooed, is partially visible resting on a surface in front of him.
